Coal India Ltd

Coal India Summary Chart Analysis Peers Quarters Profit & Loss Balance Sheet Cash Flow Ratios Investors Documents

Coal India Ltd

₹ 439 -0.05%
03 Jul - close price
coalindia.in BSE: 533278 NSE: COALINDIA
About

Coal India Ltd is mainly engaged in mining and production of Coal and also operates Coal washeries. The major consumers of the company are power and steel sectors. Consumers from other sectors include cement, fertilizers, brick kilns

Key Points

A Maharatna company
Coal India was incorporated in 1975 as Coal Mines Authority Ltd after the nationalization of the coal sector. [1] It is a 'Maharatna' company under the Ministry of Coal, Government of India with headquarters at Kolkata, West Bengal. [2]

Website BSE NSE
  • Market Cap ₹ 2,70,359 Cr.
  • Current Price ₹ 439
  • High / Low ₹ 491 / 369
  • Stock P/E 8.69
  • Book Value ₹ 193
  • Dividend Yield 6.04 %
  • ROCE 35.3 %
  • ROE 28.5 %
  • Face Value ₹ 10.0
Edit ratios

Pros

  • Stock is providing a good dividend yield of 6.04%.
  • Company has a good return on equity (ROE) track record: 3 Years ROE 38.2%
  • Company has been maintaining a healthy dividend payout of 47.1%

Cons

* The pros and cons are machine generated. Pros / cons are based on a checklist to highlight important points. Please exercise caution and do your own analysis.

* The classifications might have changed from Sep'2022 onwards. The new XBRL format added more details from Sep'22 onwards.

Classifications such as banks and foreign portfolio investors were not available earlier. The sudden changes in FII or DII can be because of these changes.

Click on the line-items to see the names of individual entities.

Documents

Announcements

All
  • Signing Of JV Agreement Between Coal India Limited (CIL) And U.P. Rajya Vidyut Utpadan Nigam Limited (UPRVUNL) On 03.07.2026
    2d - Coal India signed JV with UPRVUNL on 3 July 2026 to develop renewable projects in Uttar Pradesh.
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
    2 Jul - June FY27 power-sector coal supplies rose 5.9% to 51.44 MT; Q1 supply reached 154.75 MT.
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
    1 Jul - Coal India receives LoA for 600 MW solar plant at Jalaun Solar Park, estimated cost Rs 2,831.11 crore.
  • Single Window Mode Agnostic (SWMA) E-Auction Data Of CIL And Subsidiary Companies (Provisional) For The Month Of Jun'26.
    1 Jul - Coal India reports provisional Jun'26 e-auction allocations of 108.76 lakh tonnes, up 42% over notified price.
  • Provisional Production And Off-Take Performance Of CIL And Subsidiary Companies For The Month Of June'26 And Progressive June'26.
    1 Jul - CIL June provisional production 57.4 MT, off-take 65.8 MT; Apr-Jun production 169.6 MT, off-take 197.7 MT.
